properties.name: navbarBreakpoint
properties.description: Breakpoint below which to hide the navigation bar

properties.name: columns
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Number of grid columns

properties.name: rows
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Number of grid rows

properties.name: rightColumns
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Number of columns for right container

properties.name: bottomRows
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Number of rows for bottom container

properties.name: bottomFullWidth
properties.description: Main area (viewport, bottom, and right container): Shall the bottom container use the full width?

properties.name: navbarBorder
properties.description: Should the navbar have a border

properties.name: headerBorder
properties.description: Should the header have a border

properties.name: rightBorder
properties.description: Should the right container area have a border

properties.name: keepBottomInGrid
properties.description:
Should the bottom container be shown at the bottom of the grid even below the navbarBreakpoint?
If false, the bottom container is shown as part of the navigation bar area below the navbarBreakpoint.
In that case, the right container moves to the bottom of the grid layout in portrait mode.
